emails.subject: Re: Legal And Privacy Information.htm
emails.body: Re: Legal And Privacy Information.htm Michael, Attached for your review and comment is the updated draft incorporating=20 certain copyright and contractual relationship language. The new sections= =20 that were added are Section 1(c) and Section 4. If you have any questions or=20 comments please give me a call. Thanks, Eric Gillaspie 713-345-7667 Enron Building 3886 =09Michael Eiben =0912/04/2000 04:11 PM =09=09=20 =09=09
